title: eupatorium turbacense var. typicum
intro: Eupatorium turbacense var. typicum, commonly known as white snake root or rattlesnake root, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Eupatorium genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eupatorium turbacense var. typicum include relief from pain, fever reduction, and treatment of snake bites, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, infusion, or poultice, which can be applied topically to the affected area or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
